title: cephalocereus penicillatus
intro: Cephalocereus penicillatus, also known as the penicillus or penicillate cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The health benefits of Cephalocereus penicillatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote the healing of cuts and burns. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the stems in hot water to create a medicinal tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
